description: The owner of the fetched incidents.
examples:
Command Example
!tc-fetch-incidents incidentId=64862
13. Associate an indicator with an existing incident
Associates an indicator with an existing incident. The indicator must exist before running this command. To add an indicator, run the tc-add-indicator command.
Base Command
tc-incident-associate-indicator
Input
Argument Name

!tc-fetch-incidents incidentId=64862
13. Associate an indicator with an existing incident
Associates an indicator with an existing incident. The indicator must exist before running this command. To add an indicator, run the tc-add-indicator command.
Base Command
tc-incident-associate-indicator
Input
Argument Name
Description
name: tc-incident-associate-indicator

outputs.description: The name of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Type The type of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Name

outputs.description: The ID of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Description The description of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.ID

outputs.description: The owner of the indicator. TC.Indicator.CreateDate date
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Owner

outputs.description: TC.Indicator.LastModified date The last date on which the indicator associated was modified.
outputs.name: The date on which the indicator associated was created.

outputs.description: The threat rating of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Confidence The confidence rating of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Rating

outputs.description: The active indicator (for domains only). TC.Indicator.File.MD5 The MD5 hash of the indicator of the file.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.WhoisActive

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the indicator of the file. TC.Indicator.File.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the indicator of the file.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.File.SHA1

outputs.description: IP address of the associated indicator of the file. IP.Malicious.Vendor For malicious IP addresses, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the full description. URL.Data The data of the URL of the associated indicator of the file.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision. URL.Malicious.Description For malicious URLs, the full description.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The name of the indicator of the domain. Domain.Malicious.Vendor For malicious domains, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the full description. File.MD5 The MD5 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the file. File.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA1

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision. File.Malicious.Description
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor
